speaker: Alex
text: Alright team, let's plan the next quarter for the mobile app.

speaker: Sam
text: I think onboarding is our biggest drop-off, we lose half the users on the first screen.

speaker: Jordan
text: We should add a guided three-step tutorial the first time someone opens the app.

speaker: Sam
text: What if we let people skip the signup and try the app as a guest first?

speaker: Jordan
text: Another idea: push notifications to bring back users who went quiet for a week.

speaker: Alex
text: A risk there is notification fatigue, people might just turn them off or churn.

speaker: Sam
text: Can we see this as a mindmap?

speaker: Jordan
text: We need a faster image upload, right now it takes like eight seconds on mobile data.

speaker: Alex
text: Let's decide that guest mode ships in the first sprint, it unblocks the onboarding work.

speaker: Sam
text: We should also redesign the settings screen, it's cluttered and hard to navigate.

speaker: Jordan
text: Question: do we have the budget to add a second backend engineer this quarter?

speaker: Alex
text: Group these by priority so we know what to tackle first.

speaker: Sam
text: Last thing, we should run a quick usability test with five users before we ship anything.
